data.title: Samyang Foods USA launches limited-edition "Hotter Than My Ex" instant ramen for Valentine's Day, with updates to Buldak Original Big Bowl pricing.
data.description: Bulldak is honoring self-love this Valentine's Day by launching a special limited-edition "Hotter Than My Ex" instant ramen. The announcement was made by Samyang Foods USA on 29-Jan-2026 through PR Newswire. The company revealed that the price of the Buldak Original Big Bowl will be adjusted.

data.title: Censys named among top new integrations in Wiz Integration Network (WIN) Partner Index 2025 by cloud security leader.
data.description: Today, in Ann Arbor, Michigan, Censys, a prominent source for Internet intelligence and insights, was acknowledged in the first-ever WIN Partner Index 2025. This index, compiled by Wiz, a key player in cloud security, emphasizes the integrations that have been recognized.

data.title: Stonefire Grill in Pasadena offers half-off carrot cake slices for Rewards Members on National Carrot Cake Day.
data.description: Stonefire Grill in Pasadena, California, is offering a special promotion to celebrate National Carrot Cake Day. Rewards members can enjoy half-off carrot cake slices as part of the festivities.

data.title: Inventor from Canada creates MO TITE BUCKLE for utility belts after 23 years as a law enforcement officer.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, a law enforcement officer with 23 years of experience, hailing from Surrey, BC, Canada, introduced the MO TITE BUCKLE. The innovative utility belt buckle offers improved flexibility in adjusting tightness. The inventor's design aims to provide enhanced comfort for users, showcasing a new approach in utility belt accessories.

data.title: McLean & Company research emphasizes importance of post-incident reviews for building resilience after crises.
data.description: A recent study conducted by McLean & Company reveals that organizations that deliberately take time to pause and engage in open, safe discussions following a crisis experience a positive shift in resilience. This approach allows for reflection and implementation of learnings, transforming disruption into a tool for growth. This proactive strategy has been shown to be effective in mitigating the negative impacts of crises. It highlights the importance of creating a supportive environment for dialogue post-crisis.

data.title: Access to capital is crucial in trading; differentiates consistent traders from retail traders.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, it was emphasized that access to capital has emerged as a critical element distinguishing successful traders from those who struggle at the retail level in the current trading landscape. Factors such as trading strategy, discipline, and risk management play a crucial role in this distinction.

data.title: CAQH appoints Melissa Frieswick as Chief Commercial Officer, enhancing collaborations. - Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: In an important development signaling growth, CAQH is enhancing its collaborations with providers, health plans, and partners. On January 29, 2026, in Washington, CAQH, a key player in healthcare data connectivity, revealed the selection of Melissa Frieswick as the company's inaugural Chief Commercial Officer. This move marks a significant step forward in CAQH's strategic vision and engagement approach.

data.title: Serverfarm, backed by Manulife IM, secures $3.0B credit facility to expand hyperscale campus development; includes 500MW+ Houston campus.
data.description: A group of 23 lenders has provided funding for AI-ready infrastructure projects, such as the construction of a Houston campus with a capacity exceeding 500MW. The company Serverfarm, known for its development of high-performance data center infrastructure, recently secured a $3.0 billion credit facility to support these initiatives. This funding marks a significant investment in advancing technological capabilities and expanding critical data infrastructure.

data.title: Webinar on Gen AI in Corporate Accounting on Feb 19, 2026 - explores impact of AI in financial operations.
data.description: Dublin - A seminar titled "Gen AI In Corporate Accounting 2026" has recently been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This conference scheduled for Feb 19, 2026, delves into the influence of Generative AI (GenAI) on corporate accounting procedures. It will address the opportunities and obstacles associated with incorporating AI technologies into financial activities, reporting processes, and strategic decision-making within organizations. The seminar aims to provide attendees with a comprehension of the basics of GenAI and its relevance to accounting practices. Participants will be able to evaluate the impact of AI on accounting and gain insights into its applications in this field.

data.title: CFTC and SEC join forces on 'Project Crypto', with Chairs Selig and Atkins discussing regulation harmonization at agency event.
data.description: On Thursday, CFTC Chair Michael Selig and SEC Chair Paul Atkins co-hosted a collaborative discussion focusing on aligning regulatory approaches towards cryptocurrency. The event emphasized the importance of harmonizing regulations in this rapidly growing industry. Key topics covered included streamlining procedures, improving oversight, and enhancing clarity for market participants. This significant initiative aimed to address the challenges posed by the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency, gathering the perspectives of industry experts and stakeholders.

data.title: Father of eight, Jason Hubbard, acquires Dickey’s Barbecue Pit in Fort Collins and Greeley from aerospace to barbecue.
data.description: A resident of Northern Colorado, Jason Hubbard, has taken ownership of two Dickey’s Barbecue Pit establishments in Fort Collins and Greeley. Transitioning from the aerospace sector to the barbecue business, Hubbard leverages his supply chain skills in overseeing the locations at 2721 S. College Ave in Fort Collins and 6628 W. 10th Street in Greeley. With eight children and strong community connections, Hubbard aims to bring a new flavor to the local dining scene.

data.title: IotaComm® introduces 800 MHz LoRaWAN® Reference Design and Environmental Sensor on licensed spectrum platform.
data.description: A recent announcement from IotaComm® in Chapel Hill, N.C., on Jan. 29, 2026, highlighted a breakthrough in accelerating ecosystem development for carrier-grade LPWAN. The new hardware, software, and modem reference architecture has been introduced, aimed at boosting the ecosystem growth. Additionally, an FCC-authorized Environmental Sensor has been revealed, indicating commercial readiness. This move showcases a strategic advancement in the industry towards widespread adoption.

data.title: Inventor from Lake City, Fla. creates DOGGY PLAYHOUSE kit for dogs with feeding/watering and urinating/defecating options.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, an inventor from Lake City, Florida shared their motivation behind creating a comprehensive kit for dogs. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient and mess-free solution for feeding, watering, urinating, and defecating for dogs. The innovative product, known as the DOGGY PLAYHOUSE, integrates all these functions in one design. This all-in-one kit offers a streamlined approach to pet care and is designed to enhance the experience for both dogs and their owners.

data.title: Scott Woodward named 2025 Distinguished Alumnus by Saint Leo University, award to be presented in Alumni Weekend March 6-8, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Scott Woodward, the CEO & Chief Creative Officer at SEW Branded, has been selected as the recipient of the 2025 Distinguished Alumnus/a Award by Saint Leo University. The award ceremony will take place during the Alumni Weekend scheduled for March 6–8, 2026.
